name: Puffco Plus V2 Dart 3 Pack
summary: The Puffco Plus V2 Dart 3 Pack has been expertly designed to provide top-notch performance, durability, and effortless cleaning.
description: The Puffco Plus V2 Dart 3 Pack has been expertly designed to provide top-notch performance, durability, and effortless cleaning. With a silicone top and scoop-shaped loading tool, these darts offer an extended length and make collecting concentrates a breeze. Additionally, a built-in carb cap and splash guard ensure optimal airflow and a superior experience. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer and our own experience using the product. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
